_doc: Tokens the translation pipeline must keep verbatim in every language. Tickers and company names are auto-protected from stocks.ts at runtime; this file holds brand/product terms and the categories of things to never translate.
keep_verbatim_categories: company and product names (e.g. Nvidia, Booking.com, Orkin, iShares, Aladdin)
numbers, percentages and currency figures (localize only the decimal separator and currency word)
